bodyMeasurements.initialMessage:
📏 Send your body measurements.

You can write everything in one message in any format — I’ll figure it out.

For example:
weight 78.4, waist 84, chest 101, hips 97, thigh 56
bodyMeasurements.editPrompt: ✏️ Send the corrected body measurements in one message — I’ll parse them.
bodyMeasurements.invalidInput:
❌ I couldn’t recognize the body measurements.

Send them again in one message in any format — I’ll figure it out.
bodyMeasurements.unavailable:
🚧 Body measurements are still getting ready for launch.

For now, keep tracking your numbers — we’ll connect them here soon.

conversations.cancelled:
👌 OK, body measurements were not saved.

We can come back to them when it’s convenient.
conversations.safeError:
Something didn’t go as planned.

Try sending your body measurements again.
conversations.unsupportedAction: This action is not available for body measurements yet.
conversations.unsupportedInput: I can’t use this message for body measurements yet.

empty.title: No measurements yet
empty.hint: Add 2+ measurements to see a trend.

insight.title: Insight
insight.text: Талія зменшується, поки вага залишається контрольованою. Схоже на рекомпозицію тіла, а не просто схуднення..
insight.noDataText: No measurements yet. Add your first weight or body measurement, and I will start building a useful progress insight from the next check-ins.
